name: @kitup/cli
description: A unified, cross-platform updater for AI coding assistants

scripts.test: bash -n install.sh && bash -n kitup && bash -n kitup.sh && bash test-regression.sh && bash -lc 'if command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then pwsh -NoProfile -Command "[void][System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile(\"kitup.ps1\",[ref]$null,[ref]$null)"; else echo "Skipping pwsh syntax validation"; fi'
